highlights.text: Ubud (3N) → Seminyak/Kuta (4N) with Nusa Penida day cruise
Bali Swing, Monkey Forest & Kintamani volcano views
Tanah Lot, Uluwatu Kecak Fire Dance & Jimbaran seafood feast
Private MPV with English-speaking guide throughout

itinerary.title: Premium Bali Family Tour
itinerary.overview: The ultimate Bali family tour — a majestic journey through mystical emerald rice terraces, iconic sea temples, and exclusive experiences designed for multi-generational families. Includes premium handpicked stays, Nusa Penida catamaran cruise, private MPV with professional guide, and TRAGUIN 24/7 concierge support. Best season: April to October.
itinerary.seo_title: ID-005 | Premium Bali Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 07 Nights / 08 Days Bali family package (ID-005): Ubud, Nusa Penida, Tanah Lot, Uluwatu, Kintamani, and Seminyak with private MPV and catamaran cruise.

highlights.text: Tegalalang Rice Terraces & Private Bali Swing
Tanah Lot Sea Temple at Sunset

days.title: Arrival in Bali & Transfer to Ubud
days.description: Arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport with a warm Balinese welcome. Traditional cold towel and flower garlands before your scenic drive to Ubud. Check into your premium handpicked luxury resort villa.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Airport meet & greet, Ubud scenic transfer
Overnight Stay: Ubud (Premium Handpicked Resort Villa)
Meals Included: Welcome drink & premium curated dinner

days.title: Ubud Cultural Immersion — Emerald Rice Terraces
days.description: Visit the breathtaking Tegalalang Rice Terraces with private Bali Swing experience. Walk through the Sacred Monkey Forest and Ubud Royal Palace. Organic farm-to-table lunch overlooking the landscape.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tegalalang Rice Terraces, Bali Swing, Monkey Forest, Ubud Royal Palace
Overnight Stay: Ubud (Premium Handpicked Resort Villa)
Meals Included: Breakfast & gourmet lunch

days.title: Kintamani Volcano Majesty & Sacred Purification
days.description: Journey to Kintamani for panoramic Mount Batur views. Visit Pura Tirta Empul holy water temple and local coffee and spice plantations.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kintamani volcano viewpoint, Tirta Empul Temple, coffee plantations
Overnight Stay: Ubud (Premium Handpicked Resort Villa)
Meals Included: Breakfast & lunch at volcano-view restaurant

days.title: Tanah Lot & Transition to Coastal Luxury
days.description: Visit the mystical Tanah Lot Temple en route to Seminyak/Kuta. Check into your ultra-luxury beachfront resort.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tanah Lot sea temple, southern coastal highlights
Evening Experience: Sunset at premium Seminyak beach club cabana
Overnight Stay: Seminyak / Kuta (Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & premium seafood dinner

days.title: Nusa Penida Exclusive Cruise
days.description: Premium high-speed catamaran day cruise to Nusa Penida. Visit Kelingking Beach, Angel's Billabong, and Broken Beach.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Nusa Penida catamaran cruise, Kelingking Beach, Angel's Billabong, Broken Beach
Overnight Stay: Seminyak / Kuta (Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & international buffet lunch on cruise

days.title: Uluwatu Cliff Temple & Fire Dance
days.description: Explore the majestic Uluwatu Temple perched on a 70-meter cliff. Premium reserved seats for the Kecak Fire Dance at sunset. Candlelit family dinner on Jimbaran Bay sand.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Uluwatu cliff temple, premium Kecak Fire Dance, Jimbaran Bay
Evening Experience: Jimbaran Bay seafood feast on the sand
Overnight Stay: Seminyak / Kuta (Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Jimbaran seafood feast

days.title: Leisure, Spa & Luxury Shopping
days.description: Complimentary Balinese massage at resort spa. Curated shopping tour of Seminyak luxury boutiques. Grand farewell dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Seminyak luxury retail tour, beachfront leisure
Evening Experience: Grand farewell dinner at Indonesian heritage estate
Overnight Stay: Seminyak / Kuta (Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & grand farewell dinner

days.title: Farewell Bali
days.description: Final gourmet breakfast before private chauffeur transfer to Ngurah Rai International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport departure transfer
Meals Included: Gourmet buffet breakfast

inclusions.text: 07 Nights accommodation at selected luxury handpicked hotels
Dedicated private MPV with English-speaking professional guide
Daily premium breakfasts, 3 specialty lunches, and 4 high-end dinners
Nusa Penida high-speed catamaran cruise with premium island sightseeing
Traditional Balinese flower garlands, welcome drinks, and aromatherapy towels
One complimentary 60-minute Balinese spa treatment per adult guest
Private front-row reserved seating at Uluwatu Kecak Fire Dance
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated local emergency assistance and concierge
Local government tourism taxes, service charges, and fuel surcharges
Personal expenses, laundry, mini-bar, and optional water-sports
